title: Annihilator (disambiguation)
content:
'''Annihilator''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Liberty's Misrule|Annihilator]]''''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] later known as the ''Liberty's Misrule''.
*'''''[[Annihilator]]''''', a [[Star Destroyer]] that partook in the [[Battle of Endor]].
*'''[[Scorpenek annihilator droid]]''', a type of droid used by the [[Pyke Syndicate]] during the [[Battle of Mos Espa]].
*'''[[DT-57 "Annihilator" blaster]]''', a type of [[blaster]].
**"'''[[Grievance Striker]]'''," also known as the '''Annihilator'''.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Annihilator (alias)|Annihilator]]''', an alias used by the droid [[BLX-5|Bollux]].
*'''''[[Annihilator (Executor-class)/Legends|Annihilator]]''''', an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] owned by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaarn]].
*'''''[[Annihilator (Imperial I-class)|Annihilator]]''''', a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] which patrolled near [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] and the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]].
*'''''[[Annihilator (starship)|Annihilator]]''''', an Imperial command ship.
*'''''[[Annihilator 1]]''''', [[Beri Tulon]]'s personal [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]].
*'''[[Annihilator (superweapon)|Annihilator]]''', a nonexistent [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]].
*'''[[Annihilator-class starfighter|''Annihilator''-class starfighter]]''', manufactured by the [[One Sith]].
*'''[[Scorpenek annihilator droid/Legends|Scorpenek annihilator droid]]''', built by the [[Colicoid Creation Nest/Legends|Colicoid Creation Nest]].
*'[[DT-57 "Annihilator" blaster/Legends|''DT-57 blaster''']], also known as the '''"Annihilator."'''
*'[[Hypermatter reactor/Legends|''Hypermatter annihilator''']], reactor, used in the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Stars]].
{{Disambig}}
